'''Bacta Company''' was a [[Company/Legends|company]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] that was active during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The company was under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone Captain]] [[Tyto (Bacta Company)|Tyto]]. It was one of four companies, alongside [[K Company]], that made up [[Clone major/Legends|Clone Major]] [[Twelve]]'s [[Hawkbat Battalion]].<ref name="GAR Guide" />

Bacta Company consisted of 144 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] that were organized into four [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]], including [[2nd Platoon]], along with support personnel.<ref name="GAR Guide" /> It shared its name with [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], a healing fluid used to treat wounds.<ref name="DB Bacta">{{DB|technology|bactatank|bacta tank}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Bacta Company was mentioned in the [[Star Wars Insider 84|eighty-fourth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine in the "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]" feature, which was written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]].<ref name="GAR Guide" /> The issue was released on [[September 26]], [[2005]].<ref name="SW">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20050913.html|text=The Ultimate Clone Guide in ''Star Wars Insider'' #84}}</ref>
